items.title: With Luke Kennard in the fold for the Taxpayer MLE of $6.1M, the Phoenix Suns project to be about $4.9M under their second-apron hard cap.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
With Luke Kennard in the fold for the Taxpayer MLE of $6.1M, the Phoenix Suns project to be about $4.9M under their second-apron hard cap.

That should be enough flexibility for in-season moves. Suns roster is now at 15 players on standard deals.

items.title: The Suns can sign Luke Kennard to two years, $12.4 million with the taxpayer mid-level exception.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
The Suns can sign Luke Kennard to two years, $12.4 million with the taxpayer mid-level exception.

They can give him this with the non-tax mid-level if they get under the first apron.

This signing offsets the $30 million in luxury tax savings from the Miles Bridges trade.
